title: Broken window weather seal and glass zone
summary: Handles glass, weather, privacy, and ventilation after a broken window.
content: Broken window weather seal and glass zone is a practical offline routine for window repair safety. Clear people and pets from the glass zone before sweeping. Pick large pieces with protection if available and place them in a rigid marked container. Sweep small shards with light from different angles and check shoes, bedding, and floor cracks. Cover the opening without sealing all ventilation when heat, illness, or cooking is an issue. Review after wind, rain, aftershocks, or children entering the room. The goal is to make the action repeatable by a tired person, visible to helpers, and safe enough to stop when official help or a safer option appears.
materials: Gloves if available. Context: “Broken window weather seal and glass zone”.
Tape. Context: “Broken window weather seal and glass zone”.
Broom. Context: “Broken window weather seal and glass zone”.
